workingPrinciple: Below the breakover voltage the Diode for Alternating Current (DIAC) is off (high resistance). Once exceeded, it switches to a low-voltage conducting state until current falls below holding.
steps: At breakover voltage it switches on
A trigger pulse flows to the Triode for Alternating Current (TRIAC) gate
Current drops after firing; DIAC resets
microscopicExplanation: The p-n-p-n symmetric structure has no gate; avalanche breakdown at the breakover voltage creates a negative-resistance region that snaps the device into conduction.
